name: Fisetin
summary: Naturally occurring flavone tracked as a candidate senolytic with in vitro senescent-cell selectivity and active human trial-watch records in older-adult frailty and vascular-function settings.
mechanism_summary: Reported to induce apoptosis in some senescent cell types, especially senescent endothelial cells in discovery assays, but selectivity varies by cell type and human efficacy remains unposted in aging-relevant trials.

open_questions: Whether fisetin clears senescent cells in humans at tested doses
Whether active frailty and vascular-function trials post aging-relevant biomarker or functional results
How supplement formulation, exposure, and tissue distribution affect senolytic activity
